data.title: Cathie Wood Continues To Sell Shares Of Jack Dorsey's Bitcoin-Focused Company Block — Ark Also Dumps Moderna, Robinhood Stock
data.description:
On Wednesday, Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest made significant trades involving Block Inc (NYSE:SQ) and Moderna Inc (NASDAQ:MRNA).

Guaraní Cannabis Lands In Europe: Paraguay To Export 100% Of Its Flower Production
data.description: Paraguay secures a major deal to supply 100% of its premium flower production to Europe in 2024, marking a milestone for cannabis.

data.title: Why Dogecoin Rival Shiba Inu Is Up 10% Over The Past Week
data.description: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is trading higher by 10% to the $0.000018-level over the trailing week.
